name: Chocolate Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave chocolate with water at high for 2 minutes. Stir until chocolate is completely melted and smooth.
2. Cool to lukewarm. (Alternatively, heat with water in a saucepan over very low heat, stirring constantly until just melted. Remove from heat and cool for five minutes.)
3. Beat in cream cheese and vanilla until well blended.
4. Gradually beat in sugar until well blended and smooth.
Makes about 2 1/4 cups or enough to frost a 9-inch layer.
